prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. Copy exact request evidence for semantic choices. Use only supplied identifiers. Return JSON only.

terminal_goals.evidence_text: The document review source material has been collected and organized into a structured bundle for further processing.
The assembled document review packet has been validated for accuracy and completeness, ensuring that all necessary information is correctly captured and formatted.
The verified document review brief has been successfully published in both JSON and signed PDF formats as per the specified requirements.
The final document review result has been archived for long-term retention, ensuring it is available for future reference and compliance with organizational standards.
